entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop being studied, specifically Somalia germplasm

entities.name: SHOOT FLY
entities.description: The pest Atherigona varia soccata Rondani that attacks sorghum

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO SHOOT FLY
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to resist attack by the shoot fly

entities.name: LESS OVIPOSITION
entities.description: A component of resistance characterized by fewer eggs laid by the shoot fly

entities.name: LESS DAMAGE
entities.description: A component of resistance characterized by reduced plant damage

entities.name: DEAD HEARTS
entities.description: A symptom of shoot fly damage used as a measure of resistance

entities.name: TOLERANCE/RECOVERY RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to recover from shoot fly attack

entities.name: SEASONAL VARIATION
entities.description: The change in resistance levels across different seasons

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: An environmental parameter influencing varietal resistance

entities.name: HUMIDITY
entities.description: An environmental parameter influencing varietal resistance

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: An environmental parameter influencing varietal resistance

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER
entities.description: The site where the experimental sowings were conducted

entities.name: EVALUATION FOR RESISTANCE
entities.description: The process of assessing sorghum entries for their resistance to shoot fly

relationships.description: Sorghum exhibits resistance to shoot fly
Less oviposition is a measure of resistance
Less damage is a measure of resistance
Tolerance/recovery is a type of resistance
Less damage results in fewer dead hearts
Seasonal variation affects resistance to shoot fly
Evaluation was conducted on sorghum entries
Evaluation measured resistance to shoot fly
Evaluation was conducted at ICRISAT Center
